name: Canada Goose in Orange Sauce
recipeIngredient: 2-6 ounces cans frozen orange juice concentrate, pulp-free
4 tablespoons orange marmalade or plum jelly
recipeInstructions:
1. Slowly thaw the bird (overnight in cold water or refrigerator) and clean thoroughly.
2. Place goose breast down in oven-cooking bag, seal and bake in a covered roasting pan for approximately 1 to 1-1/2 hours at 325 degrees Fahrenheit.
3. Pour fat and drippings from the goose and discard.
4. Mix the above ingredients together and pour over the goose and into the cooking bag, sealing it.
5. Return to the roasting pan and continue cooking for 2-4 more hours, or until the goose is falling off the bones or appears tender.
6. Pour the sauce into a gravy boat and serve with sliced goose.
